channel.title: World
channel.description: The Washington Post World section provides information and analysis of breaking world news stories. In addition to our world news and video, Post World News offers discussions and blogs on major international news and economic issues.

item.title: Trump says U.S. and Iran will meet to negotiate after days of strikes
item.dc:creator: Sammy Westfall
item.description: Both sides will “stand down for now,” a U.S. official said, as talks are set to continue in Qatar. Iran hasn’t publicly confirmed the meeting.

item.title: U.S., Iran launch new strikes, testing fragile ceasefire as Hormuz tensions flare
item.dc:creator: Victoria Craw, Suzan Haidamous
item.description: Tehran said it launched strikes on U.S. interests in the Middle East, and Bahrain and Kuwait said they were targeted, as clashes continue to threaten the ceasefire.
